system.description: Full-body low-poly animal sculpture prompt generator
system.base_template: A full-body 3D sculpture of a {animal}, placed in a {pose}. The design is low-poly geometric faceted with sharp, distinct edges. It is crafted from luxurious {color} {material}. It is accessorized with {accessory}. High-end modern art object photography, professional studio lighting with dramatic reflections, clean neutral background, 8k resolution, C4D render style.
